emails.subject: Industry shift
emails.body: Hi Sarah, three trends reshaping fintech identity: embedded verification, real-time risk scoring, and AI-driven document checks. Stripe's positioned well for all three.

emails.subject: 3 patterns in payments
emails.body: Sarah, the fastest-growing payment platforms share one thing: they treat identity verification as a conversion lever, not a compliance checkbox. Here's what that looks like in practice.

emails.subject: What top fintechs do differently
emails.body: The payment companies growing fastest right now all automated identity checks at the onboarding step. One saw merchant activation improve 23% — just by removing manual review friction.

emails.subject: Useful framework
emails.body: Sarah, wrote up a framework for evaluating identity verification approaches in payments. Covers build vs buy tradeoffs specific to fintech. Want me to send it over?

emails.subject: Closing thought
emails.body: Sarah, no worries if the timing isn't right. If identity verification strategy comes up in a future planning cycle, I'd enjoy the conversation. All the best with Stripe's growth.
